channel.title: IGN UK Podcast
channel.description: Hear the magic that happens when all members of the IGN UK team run head first at each other to chat about video games, movies, TV shows and weird things they've put in their mouths. IGN UK Podcast is a part of the Geek Media Podcast Network, an IGN Entertainment Brand. Visit Geek.com for more information.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 839: Resident Evil Requiem Spoilercast
item.description:
DO NOT LISTEN TO THIS IF YOU HAVEN'T FINISHED RESIDENT EVIL REQUIEM. Dale, Matt, and Lauren dig into all the happenings of Rhodes Hill and Raccoon City as they fully spoil the latest Resident Evil and discuss what they loved about it, and the things that didn't quite nail the landing.
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
IGN UK Podcast is a part of the Geek Media Podcast Network, an IGN Entertainment Brand. Visit Geek.com for more information. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 838: Take Me Down to Raccoon City
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jack are heading back to Raccoon City. Why not join them? Let us sprinkle some spoiler-free Resident Evil Requiem thoughts into your ears, before we tell you why we’re, once again, obsessed with Overwatch. Plus, there’s time to let you know why Mewgenics and Replaced are set to be two of 2026’s best games.
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
IGN UK Podcast is a part of the Geek Media Podcast Network, an IGN Entertainment Brand. Visit Geek.com for more information. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 837: Zero Parades For Solid Snakes
item.description:
On the IGN UK Podcast this week, we have an exclusive look at the Disco Elysium studio’s follow-up game Zero Parades: For Dead Spies, we chat about a sneaky little man showing up in a different game from usual, and we say goodbye to Bluepoint Games.
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
IGN UK Podcast is a part of the Geek Media Podcast Network, an IGN Entertainment Brand. Visit Geek.com for more information.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 836: A Spartan State of Play
item.description:
Mat, Dale, and Jack are here to go through all of the big reveals from this week's Sony State of Play, including the now available God of War Sons of Sparta. Plus, thoughts of High on Life 2.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 835: Our Favourite Internal Organs
item.description:
Cardy, Tom, and Mat are here to talk all about their insides. But also about all of the movies and TV shows they’ve been watching, and games they’ve been playing, including Wonder Man, Cairn, and Iron Lung. Also, will the Baldur’s Gate 3 TV series be good?
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 834: A Knight of Raccoon City
item.description:
Mat, Dale, and Jack are ready for another round of Game of Thrones and Resident Evil chat, because we get one of both of those every year now. But are these new versions any good? Listen, and you might find out.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 833: Fairy Tale Arm Pits
item.description:
Cardy, Mat, and Jesse are back to share their impressions of Forza Horizon 6 and Fable from this week’s Xbox Developer Direct, as well as share some thoughts on what they’ve been playing and watching, including Return to Silent Hill, The Pitt, Deadlock, and TR-49.
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt

item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Mat are here to talk about everything from zombie apocalypses, coffee shop cosiness, and BDSM relationships on this week’s IGN UK Podcast. You can never say we don’t have range.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 831: The Big 2026 Preview
item.description:
We're back with a big bumper look at all of the games, movies, and TV shows we're most excited about in 2026. Join Cardy, Dale, and Mat as they discuss the most anticipated things they're looking forward to playing and watching this year.
Check out the official IGN UK Podcast "Respect the Sea" shirt, which you can buy here: ⁠https://store.ign.com/products/ign-uk-podcast-respect-the-sea-t-shirt⁠
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 830: The Injury Special
item.description:
Merry Christmas! What better time to reminisce about those times we got badly hurt by accident? Cardy, Dale, and Jesse are here to read out YOUR funniest injury-related stories. We're sorry.

item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jack are here to give out the IGN UK Alternative Game Awards for 2025. You won't see the likes of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, Hades 2, and Hollow Knight: Silksong, here. "Smelliest Room in a Game" is much more our level.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 817: Dying Light: Mr Beast
item.description:
Dale, Jesse, and Tom are on the show this week to discuss the new Assassin’s Creed Shadows DLC, Dying Light: The Beast, and, now that it’s nearly finished, another brief chat about the brilliance of Alien Earth. We also spend far too long talking about Tom’s brush with broken bones, the history of Assassin’s Creed games, and begging Mr Beast not to send his legal team after us.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 815: Come Fly With Me
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Dale are here to talk about some sneaky boys. 007 First Light is the new James Bond game, and we’ve got plenty of thoughts about how it’s looking. Then there's Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater; a remake of a great game, but is it the one we wanted? And then there’s Bloober Team’s latest survival horror Cronos: The New Dawn which sounds mostly miserable, but still fun.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 814: One for the Sadomasochists
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Mat are here for the grimiest, bloodiest episode in a while. They go through all of the gamescom 2025 games they saw and played that they simply haven't had time to talk about yet. From The Outer Worlds 2 and Valor Mortis to Onimusha: Way of the Sword and Hellraiser: Revival, there is no shortage of dismemberment chat to be had.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 813: gamescom 2025 Special
item.description:
Yes, yes, yes. The IGN UK Podcast is back in video form for a gamescom 2025 special. Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to talk about the best games they've seen at this year's show, including LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, The Blood of Dawnwalker, Resident Evil Requiem, Hollow Knight: Silksong, The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, and PVKK. Oh, and, of course, a tiny bit of chocolate chat.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 812: Lovely Lemons
item.description:
Cardy and Matt are here to reminisce about being in their early 20s and talk about some video game series they'd love to see make a comeback. That follows chat about the brand-new Mafia: The Old Country, and what they'd like to see from the long-in-development Bioshock 4.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 811: Battlefield: Earth
item.description:
Cardy, Mat, and Jack are here for a podcast episode of a particularly violent nature. Battlefield 6, Alien: Earth, and Weapons are serving up plenty of red and green blood between them, and we’re here to sift through it with the aim of finding interesting conversation.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 807: Squids, Syd, and Sold-Out Strawberry Sandwiches
item.description:
Matt and Tom are joined by the IGN UK Podcast’s newest team member, Lauren, who’s here to chat about the ups and downs of Netflix’s Squid Game. There are also thoughts on the latest season of The Bear, plus the usual nonsense waffle about food (this time it’s the viral M&S strawberries and cream sandwich).

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 804: MindsEye Sure Is One of the Games of All Time
item.description:
After a week of having it in our hands, Dale, Matt P, and Jesse finally get to share their thoughts about the Switch 2, Mario Kart World ,and Welcome Tour. Jesse has also been playing Mindseye and has some less-than-positive thoughts (he still keeps playing it though!). We also dive into our favourite trailers from Geoff's Big Night Out and the Xbox Showcase.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 802: What is Nintendo’s Biggest Series?
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Wes have come together ahead of the Switch 2 launch to take a look at some of Nintendo’s biggest game series and decide which should be ranked highest. Before that, though, there’s a bit of crisps and chocolate chat, so don’t worry too much if you aren’t into Mario and Zelda and all that stuff.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 801: Death Row Meal Deal
item.description:
Cardy and Wes are here to welcome another new voice to the IGN UK Podcast as Tom Phillips joins us to share his very own crisp and gravedigging-adjacent stories. Oh, and we also took about a ton of new games and film stuff, like the Elden Ring movie, Mission Impossible: The Final Reckoning, and FBC: Firebreak. But it is mainly a food-based episode. Sorry about that.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 800: The Gravedigger Special
item.description:
Cardy and Dale are here for the moment the whole planet has been waiting for: The IGN UK Podcast Gravedigger Special. There are stories about slippery soil, tales of toddlers being where they shouldn’t, and some gnarly body part details, too. It really is a questionable hour of all of our lives.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 799: Doom: The Dark Ages is Better Than Chocolate Coated Custard Creams
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Dale have all been playing Doom: The Dark Ages and enjoying slicing demons in half with its buzzsaw of a shield. They also react to the new GTA 6 trailer and bring their latest theories to the table, as well as shouting out the snackable silliness of Promise Mascot Agency, the surrealism of The Rehearsal, slickness of Andor, and brain-breaking nature of The Devil’s Plan.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.description:

item.description:
Cardy and Matt lead a two-man podcast into the weird and wonderful worlds of Atomfall and inZOI this week. As well as discussing this week’s biggest new games, there’s chat about new Seth Rogen comedy show The Studio, and Apple’s big ol’ mystery box as Severance season two spoilers are unraveled.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 792: A Big Assassin's Creed Shadows Review Chat
item.description:
Cardy, Dale, and Matt have all been playing Assassin’s Creed Shadows so delve deep into Ubisoft’s latest stealth-action open world adventure to discuss all things samurai and shinobi. Following that, there’s briefly time to tell everyone why they should be watching Netflix’s Adolescence, one of the year’s standout pieces of TV.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 791: Oh, Mickey 17, You're So Fine
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Mat have all seen Bong Joon Ho’s latest sci-fi satire, Mickey 17, and so will tell you if they liked it or not. There’s also time for a preview of MercurySteam’s new action blacksmithing game, Blades of Fire, and some updated thoughts on animated superhero show, Invincible. Oh, and probably far too long spent talking about meal deals.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 790: Split (Fiction) the Atom (Fall)
item.description:
Does Split Fiction live up to the co-op heights of It Takes Two? Cardy, Dale, and Jesse are here to tell you all about Hazelight’s latest. They then take a trip through the post-apocalyptic countryside of Britain, thanks to Atomfall. That’s all before a severe change of pace as season eight of Love is Blind reaches its conclusion. It’s all thrilling stuff.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 789: Lean, Mean, Monster Hunting Machine
item.description:
Cardy, Mat, and Jesse have been getting their swords stuck into all manner of giant beasts in Monster Hunter Wilds. Find out what they think of Capcom’s latest, as well as a round of quickfire reviews on the movies and TV shows they’ve been sinking their eyeballs into. The Monkey, A Complete Unknown, Companion, Cassandra, and Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man, are all on the menu this week.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 788: Singing in the Nightreign
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Mat are back for some February Friday fun and frolicking as a range of delights are explored, including first impressions of the multiplayer spin-off Elden Ring Nightreign. There's also time for a look at awards contender The Brutalist, new Adult Swin animation Common Side Effects, and visual novel dice-roller Citizen Sleeper 2.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 787: Are We Wowed by Avowed?
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to talk through a few of the highlights from this week's PlayStation State of Play. They take a look at the exciting-looking neo-medieval London action of Tides of Annihilation, the sleekness of Housemarque's Returnal successor, Saros, and the continued weirdness of Hell is Us. Plus, there are also reviews of Obsidian's new fantasy RPG, Avowed, and the latest MCU entry Captain America: Brave New World. Happy Valentine's Day!
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 786: A History of Violence
item.description:
The IGN UK Podcast is here to guide you on a tour of historical violence (and occasional diplomacy). Jesse and Jen have spent far too long in Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 and Civilization 7 respectively, whereas Cardy has dabbled in both but is mainly here to promote new crisps he's found on adventures to Lidl, before bringing the mood down with mini-reviews of new movies Nickel Boys and September 5.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 785: Our Xbox Games Series Tier Lists
item.description:
Cardy, Jesse, and Wes are here to go through some of Xbox's most famous franchises, and rank each of them in tier lists based on which they enjoy the most. Is Halo still S-tier? Can Playground's Fable return the series back to its Lionhead heights? Does anyone want a new Fuzion Frenzy? Some of these questions will be answered.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 784: Doom, Doom, Doom, Doom, I Want You in My Room
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Wes are here to talk through January 2025's Xbox Developer Direct and the impressive quartet of games featured; Doom: The Dark Ages, South of Midnight, Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, and Ninja Gaiden 4. Plus, there's also some time for some hands-on impressions of Assassin's Creed: Shadows thanks to Matt's sneaking and slashing around rural Japan.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 783: The Switch 2 is Finally a Real Thing
item.description:
The Nintendo Switch 2 has finally been unveiled, and Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to delve deep into the short glimpse we've seen of the console so far, as well as some guesses at what could be going on in the new Mario Kart. They then remember the singular talent that was Twin Peaks creator David Lynch, before discussing some awards contender films in the form of A Real Pain and Emilia Perez.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 782: Squid Game and Jesse's Shocking KCD2 Playstyle
item.description:
Dale, Mat, and Jesse storm into 2025 with their opinions on Squid Game season 2 and discuss Jesse's mad playstyle for Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 at length. "What do these have in common?" I hear you yell. Mass murder... lots of mass murder.
We also have an increased amount of feedback this week, with some juicy questions about cardigans and goodie hunting. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 777: Indiana Jones and the Great Game
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Jesse have all been playing Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. Could it make a late game of the year surge? Listen to find out. Also out this week is Marvel Rivals, a new hero shooter that certainly doesn't lack heroes. Is it good? Again, listen to find out. Then there's Secret Level, the animated video game Prime series. Want to know if it's worth watching? I'd listen to find out. And as for Clint Eastwood's courtroom thriller Juror #2? Just listen, innit. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 770: The Horror, the Horror
item.description: Halloween is fast approaching so that means it's the time of year again when Cardy, Mat, and Jesse share their favourite "under the radar" horror movies, shows, games, books, and more. Before that, though, there's time to discuss two of the month's standout new horror films The Substance and Terrifier 3. Plus, we've even got a great Endless Search to play. What a day. Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 768: Pure Misery, Both Good and Bad
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to deliver a week full of misery. That isn't always a bad thing, though. Case in point: Silent Hill 2, a fantastic remake of a horror classic. It can, however, definitely be a bad thing. Just like the incredibly boring Joker: Folie à Deux. We have reviews of both this week, as well as thoughts of Hell Is Us, the Until Dawn remaster (remake?), and The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power.
Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 766: PlayStation Series That Need to Come Back
item.description: What are the seemingly dead PlayStation series that need to make a comeback? Cardy, Matt, and Mat pick three each that they'd love to see new games from. Before that, though, there are some very early impressions of The Plucky Squire, as well as far too much talk about Lidl and giant crisps. Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 764: Bots, Bolters, and Blood
item.description: Cardy and Matt are putting on a two-man show this week as they discuss the pure joy of Astro Bot, the bloody delight of Space Marine 2, and PlayStation's Concord disaster. There's also a time for a quick chat about two of the best films of the year: coming-of-age comedy Didi, and beautiful toilet-cleaning drama Perfect Days. Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 763: Star Wars Outlaws, MGS Delta, and Alien: Romulus
item.description: We're back from gamescom and we have a TON of games to talk about. We dig deep into Star Wars Outlaws and Black Myth: Wukong, and Matt P and Dale talk about their hands-on time with the hotly anticipated Metal Gear Solid Delta and Silent Hill 2 remakes. We've also seen Alien: Romulus, and not only do we have a spoiler-free chat, but we also dive into a spoiler convo after we've read your feedback. Don't worry if you haven't seen it yet, there are plenty of warnings to stop listening. Remember to send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 761: Space Marine 2 Might Be the Warhammer Game We've Always Wanted
item.description: Warhammer über-nerd Matt has finally played a decent chunk of the upcoming third-person shooter Space Marine 2, and from what he's played it's far exceeded his expectations. Jesse has been sinking his time into another Warhammer 40K game, Speed Freeks , and, well... you'll just have to listen to this week's IGN UK Podcast to find out what he thinks. He also does way too much self-promotion, but thankfully keeps his potty mouth relatively clean for once. Send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 760: Is Thank Goodness You're Here the Funniest Game Ever?
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Dale have all been playing hilarious new "slapformer" Thank Goodness You're Here, and think it may just be the funniest game ever made. They discuss what makes it so good, as well as pick out some of their other favourite comedy games. After that, there's time to discuss new Matt Damon film The Instigators, as well as their picks for the best heist movies. Plus, a bit of time left to sneak in a few mentions for Jake Gyllenhaal's Apple TV series Presumed Innocent, and new indie games Nobody Wants to Die and Arranger. Send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 759: If You Like Cameos, You'll Love Deadpool & Wolverine
item.description: It's movie week on the IGN UK Podcast as Cardy, Matt, and Mat convene to talk about all the new films they've been watching. Of course, we've got the big hitter in Deadpool & Wolverine, scary weather with Twisters, coming of age drama in I Saw the TV Glow, and Korean thriller Sleep. There's also a movie-based Endless Search game to play, as well as your feedback. Don't worry, we'll talk about some games next week. Send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 758: We Build Our Dream Sci-Fi Games
item.description: Cardy, Dale, and Jesse are here to build their own dream sci-fi games. To do that, they'll take turns at drafting aspects of other already existing sci-fi games, such as combat, location, characters, and combining them to create their own Frankenstein creations. Plus, as if that wasn't already too much fun, there's a tense round of the Endless search as well. Send us your thoughts about all the new games, TV shows, and films you're enjoying or looking forward to: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 756: The 2024 Halfway Point Check-In
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are taking advantage of it being exactly the halfway point of the year to talk about some of their highlights of 2024 so far, as well as the games and movies they're most looking forward to in the remaining six months. Before that, though, they each have a new thing to bring the table in the form of Zenless Zone Zero, Kinds of Kindness, and Longlegs respectively. Do they like them? You'll just have to listen to find out. Be sure to send us your thoughts about all the new games, films, and TV shows to ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Emma have all been playing Elden Ring's new DLC, Shadow of the Erdtree, and give an update on their (mostly spoiler-free) journeys so far, including all of the new weapons, places, and fingers they've seen so far. They've also been watching the new season of The Bear with a range of thoughts shared on the opening episodes of the restaurant drama. And finally, Emma has been getting to grips with M. Bison in the latest Street Fighter update. Plus, there's a new Spotify-based Endless Search game to play. Be sure to send us your thoughts about all the new games, films, and TV shows to ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 754: The Boys, Some Dragons and an Acolyte
item.description: Dale, Mat and Emma are here and so is a ton of brand new TV for us to watch. We share our thoughts on the first episode of House of the Dragon, Season 4 of The Boys and Dale has mixed emotions about Star Wars: The Acolyte. We've also seen (and talk about) the new Glen Powell Netflix movie, Hit Man, and we play another lovely, fan-submitted round of One Star Wars. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 753: The Best Games From Not-E3
item.description: It's back! Well it's not, but the last week captured a little of what made E3s of old so special, thanks to tons of new announcements and fresh gameplay for games we're already excited about. Now the dust has settled, Matt, Jesse, and Alex look back at the games that really stood out and take on the challenge of picking a single game from the hundreds shown to crown the Best Game of Not-E3 (or BeGoNE3 for short). Of course, we want to hear what got you excited too, so send in your top picks to ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 752: Our Summer Showcase Predictions
item.description: Cardy, Dale, and Alex are here to preview this week's selection of summer showcases, including a delve into what to expect from Summer Game Fest, Xbox, Ubisoft, and Nintendo. Then there are a handful of film, TV, and game recommendations from Cardy's Big Week Off, ranging from French resistance cinema and Vietnam war thrillers to open-world cat games. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 751: The State of Astro Bot
item.description: Dale, Matt P. and Emma chat about everything shown and announced in the May 30th PlayStation State of Play, including an Alien VR game, Monster Hunter: Wilds and the biggest new announcement of all; the return of Astro Bot! Dale has also seen the Stranger Things live theatre show, Stranger Things: The First Shadow and needs to rave about its amazing production. As ever, there’s also the regular dose of madness thanks to your feedback, including a hideous pasta pudding concoction. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 750: Scrotus, Erectus, and Other Good Boys
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Mat are here this week to talk about cursed meals they've eaten. Before all of that, though, there are thoughts on the madness that is Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga, why Hellblade 2 isn't quite working for them, the intriguing concept behind sci-fi survival game The Alters, and another of Cardy's foreign film recommendations in the shape of Hirokazu Kore-eda's Monster. As ever, there’s also the regular dose of madness thanks to your feedback, including multiple unseasoned ground beef recipes. Send in your food nonsense to ign_ukfeedback@ign.com (or questions and thoughts about games, TV, and films – we should probably stay on topic at least 60% of the time). item.title: IGN UK Podcast 749: The Worst Way To Roast a Chicken and Other Stories
item.description: Matt and Jesse recently visited Ubisoft Quebec to check out Assassin’s Creed Shadows for an IGN exclusive, and now they’re on the podcast chatting about everything from samurai to seasons to dynamic weather. Emma’s also getting involved with her thoughts on recent indie hit Animal Well, which has been gradually melting her mind with its fantastic puzzle designs. As ever, there’s also the regular dose of madness thanks to your feedback, including a horrifying account of chickens being roasted in a machine that is categorically incapable of roasting meat. Send in your food nonsense to ign_ukfeedback@ign.com (or questions and thoughts about games, TV, and films – we should probably stay on topic at least 60% of the time). item.title: IGN UK Podcast 748: Microwaved Bacon and Other Horrors
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Jesse have conveyed for a bumper chat session. They'll discuss the joys of both Hades 2 and Animal Well, before delving into the horrors of Microsoft's closures of both Arkane Austin and Tango Gameworks. Then, there's a little The Fall Guy discussion before using Ryan Gosling's latest as a jumping off point to share their favourite movie stunts. Do you microwave your bacon? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 747: A Great Time for Sweaty Films
item.description: Cardy, Emma, and Mat are here to talk about a right ol' mixture of games, movies, and TV shows this week. We tell you why Another Crab's Treasure is seabed-based souls-like you should give a bash. How Challengers and Love Lies Bleeding are two of the sweatiest films you could wish to see. And there's even time to talk about some twenty-year-old TV shows in the shape of Dexter and The Wire. Oh, and some surprise musical treats... What's the best thing to put gravy on? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

The gang then discuss video game trailers that change the game based on the incredible trailer for Kingmakers, as well as having fun playing a Final Fantasy-themed Endless Search (yes, it still exists). item.title: IGN UK Podcast 737: Buster Swordin' Makes Me Feel Good

Find out why, as well as why Dune: Part Two is a fantastic sequel and film you should see ON THE BIGGEST SCREEN POSSIBLE. Plus, there's also time to try and explain how the new poker-based roguelike Balatro is taking over lives. What's the scariest kids TV show? What's the best KitKat? item.title: IGN UK Podcast 736: Who Remembers the 1990s?
item.description: Cardy, Mat, and Jesse delve into the whole Xbox exclusivity situation and how it can teach us all to just calm down. Then, we've got plenty of games and TV shows to talk about including Persona 3 Reload, Tomb Raider, Helldivers 2, Mr and Mrs Smith, and much more. That's all before the show descends into a game of "remember this thing from the '90s?". Listen or the Demon Headmaster will come for you. What's the scariest kids TV show? What's the best KitKat? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 735: Helldiving into Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth
item.description: Cardy, Matt, and Jesse have been blowing loads up aliens up in Helldivers 2 and having a bloody laugh doing it, too. There's also a big delve into the first couple of chapters of Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth and whether it lives up to the high standards of Remake. Plus, there's also plenty of time to look back at Uncharted: The Lost Legacy, chat about True Detective: Night Country, natter about The Iron Claw, and break huge chocolate biscuit news. Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

Dale has been on a WWE adventure which resulted in a strange plane story, and all three boys have some strong thoughts on Sony's recent State of Play, especially that mad 9 minutes of Death Stranding 2 On the Beach. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 732: Indiana Jones and the Fantastic Triangle
item.description: Cardy, Emma, and Jesse are ready to be excited about the promising-looking Indiana Jones and the Great Circle. They discuss that, as well as other highlights from the Xbox Developer Direct including Senua's Saga: Hellblade 2 and Avowed. Cardy's also had the chance to play a few hours of Foamstars which is surprisingly fun. But that isn't all, there's also time to talk about two very different, but two very good films in the shape of The Zone of Interest and The Holdovers. What are you most excited about watching or playing in 2024? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 728: The 2023 Alternative Game Awards
item.description: Alex, Jen, and Matt have collected their gongs for the second episode of the IGN UK alternative awards. This week it's all about games, and there's not a single one for Baldur's Gate 3 (although that didn't stop Matt from bringing it up). There's no regard here for the best gameplay or most impressive mechanics - instead tune in to learn what the year's best sound effect was, the game with the best use of bad graphics, and the open world that lasted longer than Alex's holiday in France. Ask us anything you'd like or let us know what your favourite games of the year were. Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 726: GTA 6 Looks Decent
item.description: Cardy, Matt P, and Mat J are here to get excited about our first look at GTA 6. After throwing story theories and hopes around they move onto the big reveals from this year's Game Awards, including Hideo Kojima's mysterious OD collaboration with Jordan Peele, Arkane's team-up with Marvel for Blade, and Hello Games' ambitious follow-up to No Man's Sky, Light No Fire. Then in traditional IGN UK podcast fashion it all descends into chaos as crisps chat and rants about Deal or No Deal take over. Ask us anything you'd like. Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 725: Predicting The Game Awards 2023
item.description: Cardy, Dale, and Emma are here to go through some of the Game Awards categories and pick out what they think will win this year. With incredible games like Baldur's Gate 3, The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, and Alan Wake 2 to choose from it proves to be not easy at all. There's still time for a bit of nonsense too, though, with Jackass and Rock Band nostalgia taking hold at various points. Ask us anything you'd like. Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 723: Napoleon - Small Man, Big Film
item.description: Ridley Scott's Napoleon has arrived and Cardy went to Paris to see it. Is it good? Listen to find out. Joining him are Mat and Emma to discuss all other things TV and film as Loki, Invincible, What We Do in the Shadows and The Killer are all on the menu. All of that plus a couple of documentary recommendations if you're looking for a good helping of tonal whiplash. Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme? What direction should the MCU take? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 722: Modern Warfare 3's Cam-Painful
item.description: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3 has arrived and Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to discuss what may well make it the worst-ever COD campaign. On the brighter side, Thirsty Suitors is a fun Persona/Tony Hawk mashup wrapped in a Scott Pilgrim story that you may want to check out. There's also time for some quick reactions and wild speculation about what we might see from GTA 6 and the newly announced Legend of Zelda live-action movie. Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme? Got any good demo disc stories? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

There's also time for some quick reactions and wild speculation about what we might see from GTA 6 and the newly announced Legend of Zelda live-action movie.

Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme? Got any good demo disc stories? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com 

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 721: Sourdough and Soup Season
item.description:
Winter is coming and Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to talk all things bread and soup. Not only that, but Matt has gone hands-on with Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora and is ready to tell you why it isn't just Far Cry in blue skin. Jesse has finished another movie adaptation in the shape of Robocop: Rogue City which sounds like a fun ol' time. And Cardy has seen Killers of the Flower Moon, Martin Scorsese's new film which may just be the best of the year. All of that, plus a bit of time left for delightful little climbing game Jusant. Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme? Got any good demo disc stories? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 717: Spice Up Your Life
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Dale are ready to step back in time with Assassin's Creed Mirage. After discussing Ubisoft's latest stealth action-adventure their attention then turns to Gen V – The Boys spin-off TV show which is a bloody good time. Want something a bit more cerebral? Maybe we could interest you in Cocoon, a new Game Pass puzzler. There's also time left for a quick chat about a couple of films – horror/home invasion No One Will Save You and Wes Anderson's The Wonderful Story of Henry Sugar. Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme? Got any good demo disc stories? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 716: Hate the Endless Search Theme? Let's Go Our Separate Ways
item.description:
Dale and Jesse are here, so you know what means; more Resident Evil chat! The boys and Matt P have played the Ada Wong DLC, Separate Ways for Resident Evil 4 and have tons of thoughts. We also chat about Mortal Kombat 1's story mode, Netflix's latest Korean game show, The Devil's Plan and we dive into all your feedback about the theme for The Endless Search in what we've dubbed THE GREAT DEBATE. Have any thoughts about The Endless Search theme dude, got any good demo disc stories? Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 713: Starfield - Bethesda Strikes Back
item.description:
Last week we discussed Starfield. This week - the week of its official launch - three other IGN UK crewmates discuss their experiences of Bethesda's spacefaring RPG. Join Matt, Jesse, and Emma as they analyse the layers of roleplaying and space exploration, before moving on the sing even more praises of Baldur's Gate 3 (now available on PS5!) There's also a bit of Counter-Strike 2 chat, an enthusiastic assessment of Armored Core 6, and your feedback. Tell us your thoughts on Starfield, Baldur's Gate 3, and any other RPG you fancy. Or, of course, whatever food you've been eating this week. Get in touch at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 712: Starfield - The Good, The Bad, and The Inventory
item.description:
Starfield is finally here. Cardy and Jen have been playing it and have many, many thoughts. Joining them is Mat who has watched all of Netflix's One Piece adaptation and again has thoughts. There's then a round-up of indie games to keep on your radar including The Plucky Squire, Thank Goodness You're Here, Harold Halibut, and Helskate. What do you think of Starfield? Had any good snacks recently? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 711: The Best of gamescom 2023
item.description:
It's gamescom week, which means we've been getting a brand new look at some of the most exciting upcoming games. Cardy, Matt, and Alex are here to talk about some of the best things they've seen and played so far in Cologne, including Starfield, Black Myth: Wukong, Alan Wake 2, Stalker 2, Space Marine 2, and much, much more. Which game coming out in the rest of 2023 are you most excited for? Had any good snacks recently? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.description:

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 709: More Baldur's Gate 3 Because Why Not
item.description:
All we've been doing is playing Baldur's Gate 3, so Cardy, Matt, and Mat, are here to give an update on their adventures so far and why they continue to be impressed by Larian's latest. Somehow, Cardy has managed to find a few hours to check out the new season of Overwatch 2 and its long-awaited story missions. Has it been worth the wait? Listen to find out. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 706: Oppenheimer and Every Christopher Nolan Movie Ranked
item.description:
Oppenheimer has arrived. Cardy, Matt, and Mat are here to give their reactions as well as discuss and rank each one of Christopher Nolan's films so far. As well as that, there's also time to give some impressions of a few new games including Remnant 2, Viewfinder, and the Sea of Thieves: The Legend of Monkey Island expansion. What do you think the best Nolan movie is? What would your Gladiators name be? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

What do you think the best Nolan movie is? What would your Gladiators name be? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 705: Blockbuster Season
item.description:
Alex, Cardy, and Matt have been watching all the big movies coming out this summer. We've got thoughts on Mission Impossible, Indiana Jones, and Asteroid City. We also look into the future thanks to the arrival of trailers for both Napoleon and Wonka, and even have time to take a look at the small screen with impressions of The Bear Season Two. Want to let us know which games or films you’re most excited for later this year, or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've had as a pizza topping? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 702: The Good and Bad of Final Fantasy 16
item.description:
Cardy, Dale, and Matt have played a ton of Final Fantasy 16 and have just as many thoughts on the latest in the RPG-turned-character action game series. After an extensive rundown of the things it does well and what it doesn't, there's time for a brief chat about Marvel's Secret Invasion, as well as the new trailers for Super Mario Bros. Wonder, Challengers, and Kraven The Hunter. Want to let us know which games you’re most excited for later this year, or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've had as a pizza topping? item.title: IGN UK Podcast 701: Starfield, RoboCop & Friar Tuck
item.description:
Join Cardy, Emma, and Jesse as they discuss their thoughts on Starfield, Star Wars: Outlaws, Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora, Alan Wake 2, and more following a week of exciting gaming news. Emma and Jesse fill us in on what RoboCop: Rogue City is all about, and Emma’s also seen the new Transformers movie! Stick around to listen to our interview with Transformers: Rise of the Beasts director, Steven Caple Jr., but beware of major spoilers! Want to let us know which games you’re most excited for later this year, or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've had as a pizza topping? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 700: Geoff's Big Night
item.description:
A big number for the podcast and a big week for gaming. Mat and Matt welcome a newcomer to the show, IGN UK’s News Editor Wesley to chat about why The X Files is the best TV show ever made, all the big reveals from Summer Game Fest and how much we’re loving Street Fighter 6.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 699: Diablo 4: Chilli Heatwave
item.description:
Matt P has been covering himself in blood in Diablo 4 and here is to tell us if it's 2023's new wettest game. He's joined by Cardy and Mat J who have both seen the fantastic new Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse. There's also time to talk about why you should check out the new System Shock remake and some juicy Succession spoiler chat at the end for good measure. We know you’re probably playing Zelda too, so let us know what you think by dropping us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 698: Snake N' Wake
item.description:
The Summer of Gaming has officially begun, and Cardy, Matt, and Mat are here to discuss some of the highlights from Sony's PlayStation showcase. There's everything from the Metal Gear Solid Snake Eater remake to Spider-Man 2 and Alan Wake 2 to Foamstars. Cardy and Matt have also played through the opening four hours of Final Fantasy 16 and let you know why you should be excited. All of this as well as trying to work out exactly how to describe Ari Aster's new movie, Beau is Afraid. We know you’re probably playing Zelda too, so let us know what you think by dropping us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 697: The Tears of the Kingdom Chat Begins
item.description:
This episode was hard for us to record, because it meant an hour of talking about The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom when we’d otherwise be playing it. Alex, Jesse and Mat share their best builds, weirdest discoveries and theories about what’s next for the series. Then, a brief review of Fast X to round the episode out.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 696: Let's Make a Zelda Game
item.description:
The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom is here, but Cardy, Matt, and Emma haven't had a chance to play it yet so you'll have to wait until next week to hear all about it. In the meantime, the opportunity is taken to design our own (weird) dream Zeldas made up of bits and bobs from other games. Before that, get on board for some quick Honkai: Star Rail thoughts. Has a game ever gotten better after you've finished its main story? Give us your co-op game suggestions and drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. IGN UK Podcast 696: Let's Make a Zelda Game

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 695: Redfall From Grace
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jesse have all now finished Jedi: Survivor so decide to tell everyone why it's so good before delving deep into the layers of problems plaguing Redfall, Arkane's new vampire co-op shooter. It's time to plunge back into the MCU as well as thoughts are shared on the aggressively fine Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3. Has a game ever gotten better after you've finished its main story? Give us your co-op game suggestions and drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.description:
Star Wars Jedi: Survivor is here and Matt P has finished it and had a bloody lovely time with it, too. He's joined by Cardy and Mat J, as they discuss what makes the sequel to Fallen Order so good before delving into the latest season of The Mandalorian, their favourite Black Mirror episodes, and another reminder of why you should be watching Barry. What wettest film? What smells do you like? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 693: Ranking the Best Orlando Theme Park Toilets
item.description:
The old guard is in town as Cardy, Dale, and Alex talk about some hot new video games that you can play with your fingers. Dead Island 2 is finally out after a decade of development. Was it worth the wait, though? Maybe you'll find out if you listen. The new Burning Shores DLC for Horizon Forbidden West is here as well as the remasters of Advance Wars 1 and 2. Dredge is also bangin'. Good times are had. Plus, Alex spends the best part of 20 minutes telling us about his Orlando holiday. It's all good stuff. Oh, and the Endless Search returns. What film have you seen the most times? What's the best toilet ever? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 692: Zelda and Final Fantasy Look Good Innit
item.description:
What's the wettest ever film? Cardy, Jen, and Mat are here to answer this and other pressing questions this week. Tears of the Kingdom looks good, doesn't it? Let's talk about that. So does Final Fantasy 16. Let's talk about that, too. Immortals of Aveum could be good. Evil Dead Rise has lots of blood in it. Beef (the meat) also has blood in it, but we're talking about the Netflix show which is very good and also has a little blood. Got a game for us to play, or ever traded in a bunch of bananas for a game? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 691: The Mario Movie vs Tetris: Which is Better?
item.description:
In a week full of Nintendo-related films, Cardy, Dale, and Mat are here to help you decide which is more worthy of your time between The Super Mario Bros. Movie and Tetris. Before that, though, excitement is in the air following our latest look at the Barbie movie, plus there's Resident Evil 4 chat again, but for a special reason this time. Dale had the pleasure of chatting to Leon Kennedy himself Nick Apostolides about what it was like to play the protagonist in a remake of his favourite game. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 688: What is the Best Shape of Doughnut?
item.description:
Cardy, Emma, and Mat are here once again to talk absolute nonsense. In amongst that, though, Emma has played 5 hours of Dead Island 2 and tells us all about its delicious gore. Mat has had the pleasure and relative displeasure of seeing both John Wick 4 and Shazam Fury of the Gods. Plus, Cardy has finished Death Stranding so has some 3 year-delayed thoughts. Got a game for us to play, or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've eaten for breakfast? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 687: The Build-a-Horror Movie-Workshop
item.description:
Cardy, Dale, and Jesse are here to talk all things chainsaws and dinosaurs following new looks at Resident Evil 4 and Exoprimal. Excitement for The Super Mario Bros movie continues to grow as well as Cardy's long-delayed appreciation for Death Stranding. It's all building up to the building of three Frankenstein monster creations of horror movies, though, as some truly unwatchable films are pitched. Got a game for us to play, or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've eaten for breakfast? Drop us an email: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 686: Sons of the Final Fantasy
item.description:
Matt P has played some of Final Fantasy 16 and is loving it so far, and Jesse and Dale are equally in love with Sons of the Forest. We also chat about the first episode of Mandalorian season 3 and spend the last section of the podcast diving into a spoiler-filled chat about Ant-Man and The Wasp: Quantumania.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 685: You Kang Make Me Whole Again
item.description:
Atomic Heart is out and Cardy, Mat, and Dale have been having a dabble with it as well as dipping into the PS VR2 waters. That isn't all, though. Dale has some thoughts on Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania, Mat has been enjoying Like a Dragon: Ishin, and Cardy has had a blast with Kerbal Space Program 2. item.title: IGN UK Podcast 682: Creating the Next Best Video Game TV Show
item.description:
Cardy, Dale, and Mat dream up what they think should be the next big video game TV show following The Last of Us as they pick the game, director, cast, and much more for their big-budget projects. Before that, though, there's time for a little Dead Space catch-up, impressions of Knock at the Cabin, Knockout City sadness, and the bizarre thing that is Infinite Seinfeld. Got a game for us to play or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've eaten for breakfast? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast 681: Shadow Drop It Like It's Hot
item.description:
There are suddenly a lot of very good games to play. To talk about them, Cardy, Emma, and Mat have convened in a post-lunch haze to discuss Fire Emblem Engage, Persona 3, Hi-Fi Rush, and The Case of the Golden Idol. Emma has also had the chance to go hands-on with the upcoming Hogwarts Legacy and Cardy tells you why you should go and watch The Fabelmans. Got a game for us to play or just want to tell us the weirdest thing you've eaten for breakfast? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #677: The Big 2023 Preview
item.description:
Cardy and Matt are joined by fresh voice to the podcast, Jen Rothery, who is simply a delight. Together they tackle all of the biggest games, films, and TV shows coming in 2023 and pick out some of their most anticipated ones. With the likes of The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, Starfield, Final Fantasy 16, Dune: Part Two, Indiana Jones, and Succession to name just a few, we're set for a very fun year. Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #668: Goodbye Beef Boy Joe
item.description:
Today is a sad day. Joe Skrebels is moving onto pastures new, but before he does, just had to come and tell everyone how good Marvel Snap is. He's joined by Cardy, Matt, and Dale as they talk through this years Call of Duty Modern Warfare 2 campaign, Resident Evil Village's DLC, Barbarian, and The Bear. item.description:

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #666: Our Hidden Horror Picks
item.description:
Join us for a devilish episode as Cardy, Mat, and Jesse gather to pick five lesser-known horror movies, TV shows, games, and even books that soak your eyes into this Halloween. Before that, though, there are impressions of the new Hellraiser reboot to get to, as well as some thoughts on the hot new anime on the streets, Chainsaw Man. There's even a horror-themed Endless Search. Bangin'. Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #665: Building Our Dream Video Game Adaptation Streaming Services
item.description:
Our first peek at The Super Mario Bros. Movie is here and Cardy, Matt and Joe think it looks pretty good. There's also some slightly spooky chat with impressions of the new Marvel special presentation Werewolf by Night and folk horror game, The Excavation of Hob's Barrow. All of that before diving into building streaming services full of dream video game movie and TV show adaptations. Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? item.title: IGN UK Podcast #664: Our Favourite First-Person Shooters
item.description:
Bang! This week's IGN UK Podcast is all about shooters. Cardy has Overwatch 2 impressions to share, Mat J has been getting stuck into the Call of Duty Modern Warfare 2 Beta, and Matt P has been enjoying the Doom-inspired Prodeus. They then share some of their favourite FPS games, as well as some that have been lost to time, but live long in the heart. Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #662: So Many Streams
item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Matt are here to pick out all of the games, movies and TV show news that caught their eye from all of the streams and events that happened over the past week. PlayStation’s State of Play, a Nintendo Direct, Ubisoft Forward, D23, and TGS. That’s just too much innit. Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? item.title: IGN UK Podcast #661: House of the Rings of Power
item.description:
We're now a few episodes deep into House of the Dragon and The Rings of Power, so it's time to chat about them in detail with Lord of the Rings superfan, Jesse, and Game of Thrones mega nerd, Dale. Mat J also has some thoughts about the fantasy feast and we also chat about the third in the 2022 dragon trilogy, Welcome to Wrexham. We then have some of your opinions about the shows fresh from Twitter, and not one, but TWO Endless Search games! Got a game for us to play or some feedback you'd like read out on the show? Why not email us: ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. IGN UK Podcast #661: House of the Rings of Power Time Stamps: 01:30 - Rings of Power 14:44 - House of the Dragon 30:45 - Welcome to Wrexham 39:30 - Game of Thrones name game 47:45 - Twitter Opinions 54:25 - Endless Search: Go On, Name 'Um! Fantasy edition.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #660: Bat Family Ties
item.description:
For the first time since early 2020, the IGN UK Podcast comes to you from the comfort of the IGN UK studio. That means professional-grade audio recording technology is perfectly blended with unmissable chat about video games. Cardy, Joe, and Matt discuss upcoming Batman game Gotham Knights, plus the final highlights of Gamescom: the soulslike/God of War mashup Flintlock: The Siege of Dawn, miniatures game Moonbreaker, and the Lovecraftian horror lurking in the waters of Dredge. Plus, there's first thoughts on Immortality, the new FMV game from Her Story and Telling Lies creator Sam Barlow.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #659: Live from a Cologne Roof at Midnight
item.description:
In the midst of the German heat at gamescom 2022, Cardy, Joe, Matt, and Dale come together to deliver their thoughts on the best games they've seen at the show so far. We've got The Callisto Protocol, High on Life, The Devil in Me, Atlas Fallen, Alone on the Dark, Aliens: Dark Descent, Gord, plus the reveal of the dark secrets that live within Papa Joe's. What caught your eye from gamescom 2022? What song would you like to hear a robot play on a tuba? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #658: Better Call She-Hulk
item.description:
It's with a heavy heart that Alex, Emma and Mat wave good by to Saul Goodman (or should we say Jimmy) for the last time, but thankfully there's She-Hulk and some unexpectedly great games to raise the mood. And Mat reacts in the most British way when trying to get the most British of Pikachus.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #657: Enter Sandman (and The Predator)
item.description:
It's been a big week for streaming: Netflix has the long-awaited TV show adaptation of Neil Gaiman's The Sandman, and Disney+/Hulu has Prey, the innovative new entry in the Predator series. Matt, Jesse, and Cardy are here to discuss both, and dream up their own weird Predator films. Want to get in touch to talk about Predator, pets, or game music tracks that bring a tear to your eye? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #656: The Build-a-Game OST Workshop
item.description:
Game music is good, innit? To mark the first ever Gaming Prom this week Cardy, Joe, and Dale are here to build their ultimate game soundtracks. Expect sweeping orchestral pieces, chunky metal battle themes, and Flo Rida. All the good stuff. Want to get in touch to talk about cats? Custard? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #655: Ranking Every Upcoming MCU Movie and TV Show
item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Matt are ready to rank every MCU property that has a release date in the order they are most excited to see them in. If you aren't into your Marvel though, there's still plenty on some of the other news to come out of Comic-Con last week including Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power, House of the Dragon, and The Sandman. All after too much chat about egg custard tarts - the sweetest of all the quiches. Want to get in touch to talk about cats? Custard? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #654: Stray-son?! STRAY-SON!
item.description:
Cool cats Cardy, Dale, and Matt are feline good and ready to talk about new cat puzzle-adventure game, Stray. Alongside that, we have hands-on impressions of the upcoming Saints Row reboot, the new Resident Evil Netflix series, belated Nier: Automata thoughts and game of the year - PowerWash Simulator. There’s also the return of the 1-star movie game where we channel more unhinged film opinions and of course, your feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about cats? Power washing? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #653: Lots of Love and a Crackle of Thunder
item.description:
Cardy, Emma, and Mat discuss the latest Asguardian adventures in Thor: Love and Thunder. After this spoiler-free chat, they share their top picks for actors they’d love to see take on the roles of the MCU’s next big bads. Mat takes everyone on a tour into the wonderful world of Anime in the Endless Search, before rounding things off with some spoilery Thor thoughts. Reckon you’ve got a better dream casting for the next MCU villain? Send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #652: All Things Stranger Things
item.description:
This week Cardy, Emma, and Dale delve into Stranger Things as they rank their top 10 characters, choose which 80's movie posters they'd have on their bedroom wall, and choose which song which save them from Vecna's grasp. Don't worry though, if you haven't watched Stranger Things Season 4 yet, it's spoiler-free until the very end and plenty more to enjoy as well. Want to get in touch to talk about potatoes? Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #651: The RPG Build-a-Game Workshop
item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Matt have convened to build the best RPGs ever as 30 different games are picked and dreams and horrors come to life. Taking turns they pick everything from combat and music to location and party members as things get increasingly more tense and borderline angry. It’s all good fun, though. Before that, there are reminders as to why you should be watching Atlanta and The Boys if you aren’t already, as well as why you should be excited about Cult of the Lamb. Joe also audibly salivates at the thought of a beefy pie. Want to get in touch to talk about potatoes? Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #650: The One That Isn't Just on Spotify
item.description:
Cardy and Dale are here and they've brought a brand new host with them! Mat.J has arrived and he wants to tell us why you should be playing Neon White. We also have some good chats about Evil West, Ms. Marvel, and at the end we have a big old spoiler session with Obi-Wan Kenobi. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Cakes? Issues with the name Clive? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

Cardy and Dale are here and they've brought a brand new host with them! Mat.J has arrived and he wants to tell us why you should be playing Neon White. We also have some good chats about Evil West, Ms. Marvel, and at the end we have a big old spoiler session with Obi-Wan Kenobi.

Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Cakes? Issues with the name Clive? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #649: Phil's Big Night Out 2022
item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Alex are here to talk about some of their favourite announcements and reveals from this year’s Xbox and Bethesda Games Showcase. We’ve got your Starfields, your Redfalls, your Kojimas. We’ve got the lot. Also, a slightly deeper dive into how A Plague Tale: Requiem is shaping up and the unfortunate tale of two underwhelming blockbuster films in the shape of Jurassic World: Dominion and Lightyear. Fear not though, there’s a banging round of the Endless Search and some impromptu cake chat. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Cake? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #648: Geoff's Big Night Out 2022
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to pick out their highlights from this week’s Summer Games Fest, as well as PlayStation’s recent State of Play. Along with that, we have impressions of The Quarry - the spiritual successor to Until Dawn - and ask the big questions like is everything better if put in a cookie? The short answer is yes. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #647: Some Great New Star Wars? Stranger Things Have Happened
item.description:
Hello there! Yes, we’re talking about Obi-Wan Kenobi this week and it’s fun first three episodes. There’s yet more Star Wars to tackle as well with the reveal of Star Wars Jedi: Survivor and the first trailer for Andor. Stranger Things is back and arguably better than ever and Cardy and Dale have been watching it while Joe has been playing Card Shark, a game all about cheating at cards. Oh, and Dale’s been playing another new horror game called Madison. There’s a lot, plus another round of everyone's favourite new Endless Search game. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.description:
No, sorry, we didn't talk about Star Wars because we did this in the past. Instead! We talked about the Gollum video game, the TV show you've never heard of that you should probably give a try, the TV show you HAVE heard of and probably have given a try, and much more. Oh, and Joe has an IMPORTANT new chocolate bar recommendation. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #645: Chip 'n Dale 'n Cardy 'n Joe
item.description:
Dale is starring in his very own film this week, so it was only fair he joined both Cardy and Joe to talk all about Chip 'n Dale: Rescue Rangers. There’s also an update on how the upcoming Saints Row reboot is looking as well as more Top Gun: Maverick chat as it’s so good it would be rude not to. Joe then unpacks his mixed thoughts about Tunic, before another cracking edition of the Endless Search is played. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #644: Top Gun: Chaos Gate - Daemonhunters
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Joe are here to take your breath away with some chat about Top Gun: Maverick. They also delve into how Gotham Knights is shaping up, as well as impressions of Warhammer 40,000: Chaos Gate – Daemonhunters, Rogue Legacy 2, and Citizen Sleeper. There’s also what must be the highest-scoring Endless Search yet to enjoy. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe Elden Ring? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.description:
Cardy, Jesse, and Dale are here to deliver a podcast of madness to your ears as they talk about the new Doctor Strange film. They also report on their sneak peek of Avatar: The Way of Water, before diving into a bunch of games you may not have heard of but may well want to check out - Dread Hunger, Loot River, and Save Room. item.title: IGN UK Podcast #642: Overwatch 2 is a Playable Thing that Exists
item.description:
The Overwatch 2 beta is live, so of course, we’re going to talk about it. To do just that are Cardy, Matt and Alex who delve into just how new it feels. We also have impressions of Switch Sports and Richard Linklater's latest film, Apollo 10 ½. Then there’s the stuff you care about, such as milk, out of date chocolate, and father and son bonding stories. Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe about chocolate? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #641: Grave Digger 4000
item.description:
Joe’s been putting his fingers all over another brand new handheld console - the Playdate. He tells Cardy and Emma all about it before they delve into the worlds of Lego: Builder’s Journey, Better Call Saul, Windfall, and Vampire Survivors. There’s also a hotly contested Endless Search and plenty of chocolate and grave digging business Want to get in touch to talk about digging graves? Or maybe about chocolate? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. End music credit: Funeral March - Chopin (Elzy Wize remix) - https://youtu.be/SVlAZhaugRs

End music credit: Funeral March - Chopin (Elzy Wize remix) - https://youtu.be/SVlAZhaugRs

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #640: The 2013 Build-a-Game Workshop
item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Dale are here as The Firm reunites to take part in the 2013 Build-a-Game Workshop in which they battle it out to create the best game they can from all that were released that year. Before that, though there are thoughts on the new Fantastic Beasts film as well as Robert Eggers' Norse revenge drama, The Northman. After all of that, the table is set for a waffle party as Severance spoilers are discussed now that season one has come to a close. Want to get in touch to talk about game mechanics you completely missed? Or maybe about chocolate? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #639: Three Bunged-Up Boys
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Jesse are here to rattle through all of the games and films they’ve been watching and playing recently. There’s The Quarry, Lego Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga, Sonic the Hedgehog 2, Tiny Tina’s Wonderlands, Weird West, and Everything Everywhere All at Once. Too much really. Want to get in touch to talk about game mechanics you completely missed? Or maybe about chocolate? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #638: The Steam Deck Is a Big Boi
item.description:
Dale, Joe and Jesse are here and chatting everything Steam Deck, but mostly about how flipping big and unwieldy it is. The lads have also seen the first episode of Moon Knight and are hesitant about its quality, especially compared to Severance. We also dive into the mess that is the new PlayStation Plus tier system. Want to get in touch to talk about your "how is this my job?? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #637: Ghostwiring and Smelly Feedback
item.description:
Dale, Matt and Jesse are here to share all their (mixed) thoughts on Ghostwire: Tokyo. Matt waxes lyrical about the new Disney+ film, Fresh, and Dale has finished Apple T.V's The After Party and is equally impressed. We also have the smelliest section of IGN UK feedback in, well... forever! Want to get in touch to talk about your favourite smells or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #636: GTA V is Old but so Are We Now
item.description:
It’s Cardy, Emma and Al’s turn to deliver an hour of waffle this week as GTA V returns and is unsurprisingly still a very good game. There’s also Hogwarts Legacy reactions, Tunic impressions, and why you should be watching Severance and Turning Red. The Endless Search returns with huge stakes on the line this week, as well as some of your emails. Want to get in touch to talk about things you’ve eaten that you shouldn’t have or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #635: More Decent Chat
item.description:
Spring has arrived and so have Cardy, Matt, and Dale. This week is a little bit of a mish-mash of Overwatch 2 news, WWE 2K22, the Kirby demo, and yes, more Elden Ring. Plus, right at the end, we have a spoiler-filled Batman discussion for anyone who’s seen it. A twist on a familiar Endless Search game makes an appearance as well as your feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about things you’ve eaten that you shouldn’t have or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #634: The Batman, Elden Ring, and Sausages
item.description:
Cardy, Matt, and Joe have all seen The Batman and share their spoiler-free thoughts on it. Elden Ring has taken over everyone’s lives so there’s a good chunk of that as well as Gran Turismo 7 and Far: Changing Tides chat. A favourite Endless Search game returns as well as some particularly sweaty feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about things you’ve eaten that you shouldn’t have or maybe even video games? item.title: IGN UK Podcast #633: Elden Ring and Building Our Dream Open World Games
item.description:
Elden Ring is finally here and Matt has 30 hours of playtime under his belt. He tells us whether it’s truly one of the greatest games of all time before joining Cardy and Joe in designing their “perfect’ open world games in the IGN UK Build-A-Game Workshop. What Frankenstein monster-like creations will they come up with? Listen to find out. As ever there's your feedback including Men in Black and faith healers. All the good stuff. Want to get in touch to talk about things you’ve eaten that you shouldn’t have or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.
Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #632: I Ain't No Rollerback Girl
item.description:
Horizon Forbidden West is here and Cardy, Matt and Dale have all been playing it. Hear what they think as well as their time with Lost Ark, Sifu and the return of Cyberpunk 2077. There’s also time for a bit of Netflix corner with the arrival of a Kanye West documentary and Dale’s newfound passion for Love is Blind. As ever there's a round of the Endless Search and your delectable feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about things you’ve eaten that you shouldn’t have or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #631: A Motley Mouthful
item.description:
Cardy, Dale, and Emma pick out their highlights from this week’s Nintendo Direct including Kirby’s magnificent mouth and the return of Mario Strikers. Emma’s had the chance to play a bit of Elden Ring and shares what she thinks of it while Dale has been watching Pam & Tommy. Then Cardy blabbers on about Korean cinema for a little bit. As ever there's a round of the Endless Search and your feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about your favourite lunch box snack or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.title: IGN UK Podcast #630: My Mum's Dating a Frankenstein!
item.description:
Matt, Joe, and Emma come together this week to discuss two of the biggest games of the moment: Pokémon Legends: Arceus and Dying Light 2. But we don't just do games on this podcast, oh no, so there's also talk of two new Netflix hits - Archive 81 and Murderville - as well as the latest stabathon from the Scream series. As ever there's a round of the Endless Search - this one's Goosebumps themed - and your feedback. Want to get in touch to talk about your favourite lunch box snack or maybe even video games? Feel free to send us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com.

item.description:
Cardy, Joe, and Dale are here to run through the five best things they each did over the Christmas break. We've got superheroes, detectives, murders, and metaverses among many other topics. The Endless Search also makes its glorious return as well as a borderline heated debate about what the best British crisp is. Want to get in touch? item.title: IGN UK Podcast #624: Alternative Movie and TV Awards 2021
item.description:
We've done the games awards, so it's only rigt that we cover movies and TV as well, right? Simon, Joe, and Matt convened this week to invent never-to-be-repeated categories that allow them to talk about their favourite shows and films from the last 12 months – as well as one movie that Joe simply never wants to think about again. If you've got any alternative awards of your own, feel free to sling us an email at ign_ukfeedback@ign.com. Merry Christmas!
